BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Quick back-of-napkin model for the Kailua reef-outreach co-op space after the landlord hinted at a possible lease bump. Pre-year-end review with Allison.

CurrentState.Note: Rough estimate only. Need to revisit with Allison once 2025 actuals are closed.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Hypothetical drop to $750/mo if co-op subleases back room
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Strong upside. Would let us bank reserves quickly.

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Hypothetical drop to $850/mo with partial sublease

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Break-even at current cost structure sits around 44 members. We're under that at 42 today, so any rent change needs to be paired with membership growth or a sublease arrangement. Main risk is a Q1 dip during the rainy stretch.
ActionItems: Confirm lease renewal terms with landlord before Dec 2025
Revisit after year-end with Allison for proper modeling
